title: SourceHealth
description: Health status metadata for a data source. Embedded in other contracts to indicate data quality. Missing/unavailable fields MUST be null.

status.description: Current operational status: healthy = all data nominal; degraded = partial data or stale; unavailable = no data received.

source.description: Canonical source identifier, e.g. hyperliquid_info_public, binance_public, aicoin_flash, tg_monitor.

occurred_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the health assessment.

error_type.description: Machine-readable error type identifier when status is degraded or unavailable. null when healthy.

retryable.description: Whether the error is likely transient. null when healthy or unknown.

message_summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the issue. MUST NOT contain sensitive details. null when healthy.
